title: TOOLS FROM TOOLS
starterCode: // Your commands can use your OTHER commands. leg() is built from step().
hints: Small tools can build bigger ones. step() moves one square; leg() is built from step().
function leg() { step(); step(); step(); right() } — a function calling another function.
Walk three legs to trace three sides. Wrap the legs in a repeat.
briefing: Commands built from commands. step() is tiny; leg() calls step() three times and turns. Three legs walk you around the block — small tools stacking into big ones.
